title: Forge+Optimized
description: A Forge Optimization Modpack, where i put every optimization mod out of my other projects into this one.
body:
# Forge + Optimized

**This Modpack is made for Creators by a Creator, it is designed to improve the performance of forge so Modpack Creators can put the mods from this modpack into their own forge modpack so they dont have to deal with the search for optimization mods for forge, because it can be quite hard to find optimization mods for forge.**

![Forge+Optimization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6e88cada9708ab24642c1c125fac6e52a7c1a12.png)

**Creator Friendly**

This Modpack is **made for Creators** by a Creator and is designed so you can just put the mods from this modpack in your own modpack.

**Performance**

This Modpack is made to improve the default forge **performance** by adding some performance mods.

**Up to date**

I will try to keep the modpack up to date with the **newest versions** of mods/shaders..
